title: xolisma compta
intro: Xolisma compta, commonly known as  "Compositae" but more specifically, I was unable to find any specific information about the "Xolisma compta" plant, hence I can't provide any information.
side_effects: Xolisma compta can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues due to its potent volatile oils. Ingesting the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while prolonged exposure to its sap can lead to skin ulcers and burns. Improper handling of the plant can also cause eye irritation, blurred vision, and photophobia, making it essential to wear protective gear when handling Xolisma compta. Prolonged use of the plant in aromatherapy can result in headaches, dizziness, and anxiety.
